executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main (attempt 3). Critical configuration error: GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) not found or inaccessible. The workflow dispatch API endpoint returned HTTP 404, preventing any build execution. This is a blocking issue that must be resolved before any Maven build can proceed.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the workflow file does not exist at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml) or the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) used for authentication lacks the required 'workflow' or 'actions' scope permissions to dispatch workflows.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage. No Maven builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This prevents all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Potentially Disabled or Token Permission Issue
errors.description: The 404 error may also indicate that GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository, or the authentication token lacks the necessary scopes (workflow, actions:write) to trigger workflow dispatches.
errors.error_message: Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: Either GitHub Actions is disabled in repository settings, or the PAT token does not have the 'workflow' scope required to dispatch workflows via API.
errors.impact: Prevents automated workflow triggering via API. Manual workflow runs may still work if Actions is enabled, but automated CI/CD pipeline integration is broken.

recommended_fixes.title: Create Missing GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the .github/workflows/build.yml file with a standard Maven build workflow configuration.
implementation_steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory structure if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml file with workflow_dispatch trigger
3. Configure Maven build steps (checkout, setup-java, mvn clean install)
4. Add artifact upload for build outputs
5. Commit and push to main branch
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven workflow template
recommended_fixes.validation_criteria: Workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml and can be dispatched via API without 404 error

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Token Permissions and Actions Status
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub PAT token has 'workflow' scope and GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository.
implementation_steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Verify token has 'workflow' and 'repo' scopes enabled
3. Regenerate token if scopes are missing
4. Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
5. Ensure 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows' is selected
6. Update token in automation system if regenerated
recommended_fixes.automation_script: N/A - Requires manual GitHub settings verification
recommended_fixes.validation_criteria: Token can successfully dispatch workflows via API, GitHub Actions tab shows workflows are enabled

compliance_audit_log.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification

audit_trail.result: ERR-002: Token permission or Actions disabled (HIGH)
FIX-001: Create workflow file, FIX-002: Verify token permissions

notes: No GitHub Actions run was created due to workflow file not found. Unable to fetch workflow logs from GitHub Actions API as no run ID is available. Error classification based on workflow dispatch API response.
